_meta.description: Reading passages for comprehension and translation drills. dlpt_level uses same scale as vocab.

passages.title: Morning Routine
passages.arabic: أَسْتَيْقِظُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ فِي السَّاعَةِ السَّادِسَةِ. أَشْرَبُ قَهْوَةً ثُمَّ أَذْهَبُ إِلَى العَمَلِ.
passages.english: I wake up every day at six o'clock. I drink coffee then I go to work.

questions.question: What time does the speaker wake up?

passages.title: At the Market
passages.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى السُّوقِ لِشِرَاءِ الخُضْرَوَاتِ. كَانَتِ الأسْعَارُ مُنَاسِبَةً وَالبَائِعُ لَطِيفاً.
passages.english: I went to the market to buy vegetables. The prices were reasonable and the seller was kind.

questions.question: Why did the speaker go to the market?

passages.title: Family Visit
passages.arabic: زُرْتُ جَدِّي وَجَدَّتِي فِي القَرْيَةِ. تَحَدَّثْنَا عَنِ العَائِلَةِ وَتَنَاوَلْنَا الغَدَاءَ مَعاً.
passages.english: I visited my grandfather and grandmother in the village. We talked about the family and had lunch together.

questions.question: Where did the visit take place?

passages.title: University Studies
passages.arabic: يَدْرُسُ أَخِي اللُّغَةَ العَرَبِيَّةَ فِي الجَامِعَةِ. يُرِيدُ أَنْ يُصْبِحَ مُتَرْجِماً بَعْدَ التَّخَرُّجِ.
passages.english: My brother studies Arabic at the university. He wants to become a translator after graduation.

questions.question: What does the brother want to become?

passages.title: Weather Report
passages.arabic: تَقَرَّبَتْ أَحْوَالُ الطَّقْسِ وَسَتُمْطِرُ المَدِينَةُ غَداً. يُنْصَحُ السُّكَّانُ بِحَمْلِ مِظَلَّاتٍ.
passages.english: The weather conditions have changed and the city will rain tomorrow. Residents are advised to carry umbrellas.

questions.question: What are residents advised to carry?

passages.title: Hospital Visit
passages.arabic: نُقِلَ المَرِيضُ إِلَى المُسْتَشْفَى بَعْدَ أَنْ شَعَرَ بِأَلَمٍ شَدِيدٍ. سَيُجْرِي الأَطِبَّاءُ فُحُوصاتٍ ضَرُورِيَّةً.
passages.english: The patient was transferred to the hospital after feeling severe pain. The doctors will conduct necessary examinations.

passages.title: Economic News
passages.arabic: أَعْلَنَ البَنْكُ المَرْكَزِيُّ عَنْ خُفْضِ أسْعَارِ الفَائِدَةِ. يَأْمُلُ المُسْتَثْمِرُونَ أَنْ يَنْمُوَ الاقْتِصَادُ.
passages.english: The central bank announced a reduction in interest rates. Investors hope the economy will grow.

questions.question: What did the central bank announce?

passages.title: Technology
passages.arabic: تَطَوَّرَتْ تَقْنِيَّاتُ الذَّكَاءِ الاصْطِنَاعِيِّ بِشَكْلٍ سَرِيعٍ. تَسْتَخْدِمُ الشَّرِكَاتُ هَذِهِ التَّقْنِيَّةَ لِتَحْسِينِ الخِدْمَاتِ.
passages.english: Artificial intelligence technologies have developed rapidly. Companies use this technology to improve services.

questions.question: Translate the second sentence (companies use technology...)
questions.english: Companies use this technology to improve services

passages.title: Border Security
passages.arabic: عَزَّزَتِ القُوَّاتُ الأَمْنِيَّةُ تَوَاجُدَهَا عَلَى الحُدُودِ. جَاءَ هَذَا الإِجْرَاءُ بَعْدَ تَقَارِيرَ عَنْ أَنْشِطَةٍ مُشْبَهَةٍ.
passages.english: Security forces strengthened their presence on the borders. This measure came after reports of suspicious activities.

passages.title: Humanitarian Crisis
passages.arabic: حَذَّرَتْ المُنَظَّمَةُ الدُّولِيَّةُ مِنْ تَفَاقُمِ الأَزْمَةِ الإِنْسَانِيَّةِ. يَحْتَاجُ الآلَافُ مِنَ اللَّاجِئِينَ إِلَى مَسَاعَدَةٍ عَاجِلَةٍ.
passages.english: The international organization warned of the worsening humanitarian crisis. Thousands of refugees need urgent aid.

questions.question: What did the organization warn about?
Translate: يَحْتَاجُ الآلَافُ مِنَ اللَّاجِئِينَ إِلَى مَسَاعَدَةٍ عَاجِلَةٍ
questions.english: Thousands of refugees need urgent aid

passages.title: Military Operation
passages.arabic: نَفَّذَتِ القِيَادَةُ العَسْكَرِيَّةُ عَمَلِيَّةً مُحْدُودَةً فِي المِنْطَقَةِ. وَأَكَّدَتْ أَنَّ الهَدَفَ كَانَ تَأْمِينَ المُدَنِيِّينَ.
passages.english: The military leadership carried out a limited operation in the area. It confirmed that the goal was securing civilians.

questions.question: What type of operation was conducted?

passages.title: Diplomatic Talks
passages.arabic: اسْتَأْنَفَتْ الدَّوْلَتَانِ المُفَاوَضَاتِ الدِّبْلُومَاسِيَّةَ بَعْدَ تَوَقُّفٍ دَامَ شُهُوراً. يَأْمُلُ المُراقِبُونَ بِالْوُصُولِ إِلَى اتِّفَاقٍ.
passages.english: The two countries resumed diplomatic negotiations after a months-long pause. Observers hope to reach an agreement.

questions.question: Translate: يَأْمُلُ المُراقِبُونَ بِالْوُصُولِ إِلَى اتِّفَاقٍ
questions.english: Observers hope to reach an agreement

passages.title: UN Resolution
passages.arabic: صَوَّتَ مَجْلِسُ الأَمْنِ عَلَى قَرَارٍ يَدْعُو إِلَى وَقْفِ إِطْلَاقِ النَّارِ. وَطَلَبَ مِنْ جَمِيعِ الأَطْرَافِ احْتِرَامَ السِّيَادَةِ.
passages.english: The Security Council voted on a resolution calling for a ceasefire. It demanded all parties respect sovereignty.

questions.question: What did the resolution call for?
What did it demand from all parties?

passages.title: Constitutional Reform
passages.arabic: اقْتَرَحَتْ لَجْنَةٌ خُبَرَاءَ تَعْدِيلاتٍ عَلَى الدُّسْتُورِ. وَأَكَّدَتْ أَنَّ الحِقُوقَ الدُّسْتُورِيَّةَ يَجِبُ أَنْ تَكُونَ مَكْفُولَةً لِجَمِيعِ المُوَاطِنِينَ.
passages.english: A committee of experts proposed amendments to the constitution. It affirmed that constitutional rights must be guaranteed for all citizens.

questions.question: Translate: الحِقُوقَ الدُّسْتُورِيَّةَ يَجِبُ أَنْ تَكُونَ مَكْفُولَةً

passages.title: Levantine: At the Café
passages.arabic: قَعْدْنَا عَالقَهْوَةِ وَحْكَيْنَا عَنِ الشُّغْل. صَاحْبِي قَال إِنُّهْ رَاح يْسَافِر بُكْرَا.
passages.english: We sat at the café and talked about work. My friend said he will travel tomorrow.

passages.title: Strategic Assessment
passages.arabic: أَشَارَتِ التَّقْرِيرُ الإِسْتِرَاتِيجِيُّ إِلَى تَحَوُّلاتٍ جَوْهَرِيَّةٍ فِي مَشْهَدِ الأَمْنِ الإِقْلِيمِيِّ. وَدَعَا إِلَى إِعَادَةِ تَقْيِيمِ السِّيَاسَاتِ الدِّفَاعِيَّةِ بِنَاءً عَلَى مُعْطَيَاتٍ مَيْدَانِيَّةٍ.
passages.english: The strategic report pointed to fundamental shifts in the regional security landscape. It called for reassessing defense policies based on field data.

questions.question: What did the report point to?
